headline: McCormick Declares $0.48 Quarterly Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share on its common stocks, payable April 27, 2026, to shareholders of record April 20, 2026.

headline: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The Dow Industrials jumped more than 1,300 points Wednesday in a relief rally after the U.S. and Iran reached a two-week ceasefire agreement.

headline: Barclays Lowers McCormick (MKC) Target to $57, Maintains Neutral Stance
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) is included among the 15 Best Low Volatility Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On April 2, Barclays lowered its price recommendation on McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) slightly to $57 from $58.
